library.emptyHint: Paste a YouTube link to add your first song
library.deleteBody: "{{title}}" by {{artist}} will be removed from your library, including its audio files and lyrics.

import.title: Add song
import.dropHint: or drop an audio/video file here

editMeta.title: Edit details
editMeta.cleanTip: Ask the configured model to strip decoration and pick the artist's local name

clean.tip: Strip section tags and credits, normalize line breaks (keeps the language)
clean.title: Lyric cleanup
clean.majorRemoval: Warning: this would remove {{count}} of {{total}} lines (over 40%). Review carefully — the cleanup may have dropped real lyrics.
clean.noChanges: No credits or section tags found — only spacing normalized.

finder.findTip: Search LRCLIB for synced or plain lyrics by title and artist
finder.title: Find lyrics on LRCLIB
finder.subtitle: Searching for "{{title}}" by {{artist}}
finder.empty: No lyrics found for this song. Try editing the title or artist.

player.micMonitorTip: Mute/unmute mic on monitor output (stream/record leg unaffected in dual mode)
player.micLatencyHint: Software monitor may lag — prefer hardware monitoring (e.g. AG06)
player.recordStartTip: Start recording (instrumental + mic, no guide vocal)

creator.subtitle: {{artist}} · Lyrics
creator.alignTip: Auto-time units with forced alignment (whisperx on the vocals stem)
creator.hint: One lyric line per row · empty row = instrumental break
creator.hintTimed: · editing a timed line clears its timing
creator.alignFailed: Alignment failed: {{message}} — continue to tap timing by hand.
creator.importLrcTip: Load a .lrc file — line and word timestamps fill the timing automatically
creator.lrcInvalid: Couldn't read that file as LRC — no timestamps found. Creator left unchanged.
creator.lrcReplaceBody: The imported LRC re-times every line — all current taps will be overwritten.
creator.placeholder:
不是想怎么来就怎么活
But I wanna go home

(empty row = break)
creator.replaceTimingBody: Alignment re-times every line from scratch — all current taps will be overwritten.
creator.discardBody_one: {{count}} timed line changed and will need re-tapping, starting with "{{first}}".
creator.discardBody_other: {{count}} timed lines changed and will need re-tapping, starting with "{{first}}".

timing.done: All units stamped — ready for review

settings.title: Settings
settings.uiLanguageHelp: Add a folder under src/renderer/locales to contribute a new translation.
settings.libraryFolderHelp: Where downloaded songs are stored. One folder per song.
settings.languagesHelp: Offered in the import form and library filters; the code is what alignment passes to whisperx. Removing a language keeps existing songs intact.

setup.title: Pipeline setup
setup.desc: Singray needs a Python environment (download + stem separation) and ffmpeg. Install fetches a private copy into the app's data folder — nothing touches your system Python.
setup.gpuCuda: NVIDIA GPU detected — CUDA build will be installed.
setup.cpuOnly: No NVIDIA GPU — CPU build will be installed (separation is slower).
setup.firstRunDesc: Before you can import songs, Singray installs Python, the stem-separation tools, and ffmpeg. This is a one-time download.

settings.pythonHelp: Leave blank to use the app-managed environment. Set a path only to override with your own Python (must have yt-dlp + audio-separator installed).
settings.separationModelHelp: UVR model for vocal/instrumental separation. Auto-downloads on first use. Hit Refresh to list newly installed models.
settings.stemFormatHelp: Format for newly imported stems. FLAC avoids a second lossy encode after separation; existing songs are untouched.
settings.llmTestTip: Send a tiny prompt to check URL, model and key
settings.llmModelsError: Could not load model list — type a model name manually
settings.llmHelp: Used for metadata cleanup and lyric tools. Works with Ollama (default URL) or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
settings.modeHelp: Dual sends instrumental-only to the stream device while your monitor keeps the guide vocal.
settings.streamDevice: Stream device (virtual cable to the singing site)
settings.toneTipMonitor: Play a test tone on the monitor device
settings.toneTipStream: Play a test tone on the stream device
settings.deviceMissing: Saved device not found — pick again (falls back to system default).
settings.recordingFormatHelp: Container for recorded karaoke sessions (R3.REC1). webm = smaller; wav = uncompressed, universal.
settings.micDeviceHelp: Microphone for self-monitoring and recording. Saved here; activated per song in the player.
settings.micEnableHelp: When on, the mic graph starts automatically when you open a song. Disable to skip getUserMedia permission prompt.
